overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy traversing a snowy mountain landscape. The character exits a wooden shelter and runs through open snow fields, ridges, and narrow cliffside paths with expansive mountain vistas and bright winter sunlight.

events.description: character exits the shadowed wooden shelter into bright snowy mountain terrain

agents.ego_description: moving from the covered wooden shelter out into the open snow, transitioning from shadow to sunlight

entered.detail: rustic wooden structure with thick support beams and rope bindings
steep rocky mountain cliff partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a rustic wooden shelter in a snowy mountain environment. The character moves from the semi-covered entrance into the open, transitioning from shadowed interior lighting to bright natural sunlight as they step onto the snow-covered ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with mountain backdrop

events.description: character accelerates from walking to running across the open snow field

agents.ego_description: running steadily across open snow fields toward distant mountain peaks

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain range visible in the distance against blue sky
large boulder protruding from the snow

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a vast open snow field with expansive mountain vistas in the background. The terrain features scattered rocks and sparse snow-covered vegetation, bathed in bright midday sunlight as the character runs toward the distant peaks.

events.description: terrain becomes more elevated with steep cliff edge becoming visible on the right

agents.ego_description: navigating along an elevated mountain ridge with increasing exposure to cliff edges

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks covered in evergreen trees emerging from mist
jagged rocky outcropping on the ridge line
vertical cliff edge with steep drop-off to the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues along an elevated mountain ridge with patches of snow-covered bushes and rocky outcrops. The path narrows as the terrain becomes more rugged, revealing steep cliff faces and distant forested peaks shrouded in mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path with steep vertical drop

events.description: path narrows into a treacherous cliffside trail with vertical rock wall on right and open air on left
character slows to a careful walk along the narrow cliff edge path

agents.ego_description: carefully traversing a narrow cliffside path with a steep drop to the right side

entered.detail: vertical rock wall forming the cliffside barrier
distant wooden mountain hut or shelter visible ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows a narrow cliffside path with a steep vertical rock wall on the right and open air on the left. The character approaches a distant wooden mountain shelter while carefully navigating the treacherous snowy ledge high above the valley floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a mountain outpost into a vast, sun-drenched alpine wilderness. It begins at the entrance of a rustic wooden shelter, transitioning from dim interior lighting to bright natural sunlight as the character steps onto the frozen ground. As the character runs forward, the scene opens into a wide snow field dotted with scattered rocks and sparse vegetation, set against a backdrop of towering midday peaks. The terrain then shifts toward a rugged mountain ridge where the path narrows among rocky outcrops and snow-covered bushes, revealing steep cliff faces and distant, mist-shrouded forests. Finally, the camera follows the character along a treacherous cliffside ledge with a vertical rock wall on one side before turning toward another distant wooden shelter perched high above the valley floor.
